emails.subject: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates
emails.body: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates What will happen to this project. Alaska? Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates
emails.body: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates Rod, The view now is to minimize costs and move toward a sale of our A to B rights as a withdrawn partner to WMB or TCPL, or we may negotiate a deal that would allow us a back in intertest if we pay a promote at a given point in the future. Either way we will limit further funds from going out the door. Dan Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates
emails.body: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates Ok I asked gary to have you decide on Michael. I think he is utility player that can fil several roles, but if your tEam won't need help, I'm not sure if I need him. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates
emails.body: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates Gary made it sound like you had decided to lose Micheal. For my money, I think if we kept Micheal, we could get rid of all of our analysts and associates, and still handle our development deals and sales. Dan Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>

emails.subject: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates
emails.body: Re: Fw: RE: Toll Model Review Meeting Updates I agree. I told Gary you could make the call. Sent from my BlackBerry Wireless Handheld (<URL>
